mapper.select: select code_id, district_id, booking_id from t_offline_department

SELECT s.staff_code, s.staff_name, s.staff_title, d.district_id as districtId, d.district_name as district, dep.code_id, dep.code_name, b.booking_name as groupName, s.staff_note FROM t_offline_district d RIGHT JOIN t_offline_booking b ON d.district_id = b.district_id RIGHT JOIN t_offline_department dep ON b.booking_id = dep.booking_id RIGHT JOIN t_offline_staff s ON dep.code_id = s.code_Id
SELECT d.map_id, d.entity_name, d.title, n.node_id, n.node_name, d.pool_id FROM t_offline_nodeDoctor d LEFT JOIN t_offline_node n ON d.node_id = n.node_id

SELECT s.staff_code, s.staff_name, d.code_id, d.code_name FROM t_offline_staff s LEFT JOIN t_offline_department d ON s.code_id = d.code_id where s.staff_code = #{map.staffCode} and d.code_id = #{map.codeId}
SELECT `name`, fyje FROM t_offline_cost WHERE id = #{groupId}
